fact_layer_rules.confirmed_facts: Only explicit user answers or upstream-confirmed facts may be used as development basis.
fact_layer_rules.inferred_recommendations: Agent recommendations must require confirmation and must not be marked as development facts.
fact_layer_rules.missing_required_items: Pending questions, required prework, process prework dependencies, and exception open questions must remain visible.
fact_layer_rules.conflict_or_uncertainty: Low-confidence or inconsistent facts must be carried forward for review.

rendering_rules.single_source_of_truth: Customer HTML and developer HTML must be rendered from the same structured JSON fact source.
rendering_rules.customer_html: Use business-facing sections and process cards.
rendering_rules.developer_html: Use implementation-readiness sections and include a structured data appendix.
rendering_rules.insufficient_data: Show gaps or pending confirmation instead of inventing missing content.
